subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of Him Who is the Purpose of the world and the Object of worship of all peoples, Who through His most exalted Word hath caused the Ocean of Life to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم و معبود امم را لایق و سزاست که بکلمه علیا بحر حیوان را در
